TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Venetian Macau kakanan tu epah == sayaway nitaneng a labang u Ing-Caw a mimaliay Man-Lian . . nikahedekan patideng itini i tusep-seppic a mihcaan walu a bulat tuwal a demiad malingatu pasayda i hekal misiwbay, tawya a labi i tu waluay a tukian a malingatu mihapu. mahka pisiwbayan tu limaay a tukian, micumuday nu labang han makaala tu wallu a mangan ku tademaw, sakatulu satu a demiada makaalatu tusep a mangan nu tayniay a tademaw. 30Ťź¨šļļś¨°. kalingatuan nu nipisiwbayan itini i pisiwgacuan a demiadan, nu tayniay a labungan han makaala tu cacay a malebut nu tademawan. tusep-sepwal a mihcaan, Aw-Men-Wey-Ni-Si-Zen itini i sasiwbayan tu sakayepahan a siwbay nu kawlahan makaala tu Cunkuo nu cacay a bataan nu sasiidaay nu aaepahan nu sasiwbayan. itini i binawlanan sasingagan tu Venetian Macau (Aw-Men-Wey-Ni-Si-Zen śĺ≥ťĖÄŚ®ĀŚįľśĖĮšļļ) tataydaan milaben,"Wey-Ni-Si-Zen" , "Wey-Ci" . aenengan nu lalabinan u Wey-Ni-Si-Zen Macau (Aw-Men śĺ≥ťĖÄ) ku idaway atu misiwbaya, nipatideng a sangan hidan nu Amilika nu Las Vegas (La-Si-Wey-Cia-Si śčČśĖĮÁ∂≠Śä†śĖĮ) a Venetian (Wey-Ni-Si-Zen Ś®ĀŚįľśĖĮšļļ) ku nipisanga'. . siwbay nida u Wey-Ni-Si sinanumay, liklik nu sasiwbayan idaw ku nipisanga tu Wey-Ni-Si sangawan, adidiay nu sawacan atu nisangaan tu sapad nu ba'tuan. nina sangan tu aenengan a lalabinan nu lalumaan a sangan namakayda i La-Si-Wey-Cia-Si-Wey-Ni-Si-Zen nu tataydaan midang nu lalabinan, sisa sakamusa u nipitudung sa. . .
S.PHON: == *…ôn…ôtian ma ¶au kakanan tu …ôpańß == sajawaj nitan…ôŇč a r~…ĺabaŇč u iŇč- ¶aw a mimar~…ĺiaj man-r~…ĺian . . nikańß…ôd…ôkan patid…ôŇč itini i tus…ôp-s…ôppi ¶ a mińß ¶aan war~…ĺu a bur~…ĺat tuwar~…ĺ a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu pasajda i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ misiwbaj, tawja a r~…ĺabi i tu war~…ĺuaj a tukian a mar~…ĺiŇčatu mińßapu. mańßka pisiwbajan tu r~…ĺimaaj a tukian, mi ¶umudaj nu r~…ĺabaŇč ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu war~…ĺr~…ĺu a maŇčan ku tad…ômaw, sakatur~…ĺu satu a d…ômiada makaar~…ĺatu tus…ôp a maŇčan nu tajniaj a tad…ômaw. *****. kar~…ĺiŇčatuan nu nipisiwbajan itini i pisiwga ¶uan a d…ômiadan, nu tajniaj a r~…ĺabuŇčan ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu tad…ômawan. tus…ôp-s…ôpwar~…ĺ a mińß ¶aan, aw-m…ôn-w…ô-ni-si-z…ôn itini i sasiwbajan tu sakaj…ôpańßan a siwbaj nu kawr~…ĺańßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶unkuo nu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu sasiidaaj nu aa…ôpańßan nu sasiwbajan. itini i binawr~…ĺanan sasiŇčagan tu *…ôn…ôtian ma ¶au (aw-m…ôn-w…ô-ni-si-z…ôn ******) tatajdaan mir~…ĺab…ôn,"w…ô-ni-si-z…ôn" , "w…ô- ¶i" . a…ôn…ôŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabinan u w…ô-ni-si-z…ôn ma ¶au (aw-m…ôn **) ku idawaj atu misiwbaja, nipatid…ôŇč a saŇčan ńßidan nu amir~…ĺika nu r~…ĺas *…ôgas (r~…ĺa-si-w…ô- ¶ia-si *****) a *…ôn…ôtian (w…ô-ni-si-z…ôn ****) ku nipisaŇča Ē~ °. . siwbaj nida u w…ô-ni-si sinanumaj, r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu sasiwbajan idaw ku nipisaŇča tu w…ô-ni-si saŇčawan, adidiaj nu sawa ¶an atu nisaŇčaan tu sapad nu ba Ē~ °tuan. nina saŇčan tu a…ôn…ôŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺabinan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan a saŇčan namakajda i r~…ĺa-si-w…ô- ¶ia-si-w…ô-ni-si-z…ôn nu tatajdaan midaŇč nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabinan, sisa sakamusa u nipituduŇč sa. . .
S.FORM: == Venetian Macau kakanan tu epah == sayaway nitaneng a labang u Ing-Caw a mimaliay Man-Lian . . nikahedekan patideng itini i tusep-seppic a mihcaan walu a bulat tuwal a demiad malingatu pasayda i hekal misiwbay, tawya a labi i tu waluay a tukian a malingatu mihapu. mahka pisiwbayan tu limaay a tukian, micumuday nu labang han makaala tu wallu a mangan ku tademaw, sakatulu satu a demiada makaalatu tusep a mangan nu tayniay a tademaw. 30Ťź¨šļļś¨°. kalingatuan nu nipisiwbayan itini i pisiwgacuan a demiadan, nu tayniay a labungan han makaala tu cacay a malebut nu tademawan. tusep-sepwal a mihcaan, Aw-Men-Wey-Ni-Si-Zen itini i sasiwbayan tu sakayepahan a siwbay nu kawlahan makaala tu Cunkuo nu cacay a bataan nu sasiidaay nu aaepahan nu sasiwbayan. itini i binawlanan sasingagan tu Venetian Macau (Aw-Men-Wey-Ni-Si-Zen śĺ≥ťĖÄŚ®ĀŚįľśĖĮšļļ) tataydaan milaben,"Wey-Ni-Si-Zen" , "Wey-Ci" . aenengan nu lalabinan u Wey-Ni-Si-Zen Macau (Aw-Men śĺ≥ťĖÄ) ku idaway atu misiwbaya, nipatideng a sangan hidan nu Amilika nu Las Vegas (La-Si-Wey-Cia-Si śčČśĖĮÁ∂≠Śä†śĖĮ) a Venetian (Wey-Ni-Si-Zen Ś®ĀŚįľśĖĮšļļ) ku nipisanga'. . siwbay nida u Wey-Ni-Si sinanumay, liklik nu sasiwbayan idaw ku nipisanga tu Wey-Ni-Si sangawan, adidiay nu sawacan atu nisangaan tu sapad nu ba'tuan. nina sangan tu aenengan a lalabinan nu lalumaan a sangan namakayda i La-Si-Wey-Cia-Si-Wey-Ni-Si-Zen nu tataydaan midang nu lalabinan, sisa sakamusa u nipitudung sa. . .
S.PHON: == *…ôn…ôtian ma ¶au kakanan tu …ôpańß == sajawaj nitan…ôŇč a r~…ĺabaŇč u iŇč- ¶aw a mimar~…ĺiaj man-r~…ĺian . . nikańß…ôd…ôkan patid…ôŇč itini i tus…ôp-s…ôppi ¶ a mińß ¶aan war~…ĺu a bur~…ĺat tuwar~…ĺ a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu pasajda i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ misiwbaj, tawja a r~…ĺabi i tu war~…ĺuaj a tukian a mar~…ĺiŇčatu mińßapu. mańßka pisiwbajan tu r~…ĺimaaj a tukian, mi ¶umudaj nu r~…ĺabaŇč ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu war~…ĺr~…ĺu a maŇčan ku tad…ômaw, sakatur~…ĺu satu a d…ômiada makaar~…ĺatu tus…ôp a maŇčan nu tajniaj a tad…ômaw. *****. kar~…ĺiŇčatuan nu nipisiwbajan itini i pisiwga ¶uan a d…ômiadan, nu tajniaj a r~…ĺabuŇčan ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu tad…ômawan. tus…ôp-s…ôpwar~…ĺ a mińß ¶aan, aw-m…ôn-w…ô-ni-si-z…ôn itini i sasiwbajan tu sakaj…ôpańßan a siwbaj nu kawr~…ĺańßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶unkuo nu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu sasiidaaj nu aa…ôpańßan nu sasiwbajan. itini i binawr~…ĺanan sasiŇčagan tu *…ôn…ôtian ma ¶au (aw-m…ôn-w…ô-ni-si-z…ôn ******) tatajdaan mir~…ĺab…ôn,"w…ô-ni-si-z…ôn" , "w…ô- ¶i" . a…ôn…ôŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabinan u w…ô-ni-si-z…ôn ma ¶au (aw-m…ôn **) ku idawaj atu misiwbaja, nipatid…ôŇč a saŇčan ńßidan nu amir~…ĺika nu r~…ĺas *…ôgas (r~…ĺa-si-w…ô- ¶ia-si *****) a *…ôn…ôtian (w…ô-ni-si-z…ôn ****) ku nipisaŇča Ē~ °. . siwbaj nida u w…ô-ni-si sinanumaj, r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu sasiwbajan idaw ku nipisaŇča tu w…ô-ni-si saŇčawan, adidiaj nu sawa ¶an atu nisaŇčaan tu sapad nu ba Ē~ °tuan. nina saŇčan tu a…ôn…ôŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺabinan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan a saŇčan namakajda i r~…ĺa-si-w…ô- ¶ia-si-w…ô-ni-si-z…ôn nu tatajdaan midaŇč nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabinan, sisa sakamusa u nipituduŇč sa. . .
